text.title: growth-seo-link-building Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-seo-link-building as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Buying links or using private blog networks (PBNs)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Google manual and algorithmic penalties — site-wide ranking loss that can take months to recover from. The short-term ranking boost is not worth the existential risk.

failure-mode.description: Sending generic outreach at scale without personalization
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Response rates drop below 2%, burning prospect lists and sender domain reputation simultaneously.
